svg.title: Docker Compose internal architecture and startup sequence
svg.desc: Shows how docker compose up flows from YAML parsing through the Docker Engine API to create networks, volumes, pull images, and start containers in dependency order.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the docker-compose.yml file format?')
sendPrompt('What does the Docker Compose CLI tool do?')
sendPrompt('What is the Docker Engine daemon?')

g.text: All containers on same network, reachable by service name

svg.text: Click any box to learn more about that component
